title: rytidosperma clelandii
intro: Rytidosperma clelandii, also known as Spear Grass or Cleland's Wallaby Grass, is a species of Australian native grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions, thanks to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Rytidosperma clelandii can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
